diff:
diff --git a/src/parsers.py b/src/parsers.py
index 5094f17..427611f 100644
--- a/src/parsers.py
+++ b/src/parsers.py
@@ -10,3 +10,11 @@ def parse_optional_int(value: str | None) -> int | None:
     if value is None or value == "":
         return None
     return int(value)
+
+
+def parse_int(value: str) -> int:
+    return int(value.strip())
+
+
+def parse_stripped_str(value: str) -> str:
+    return value.strip()
diff --git a/src/settings.py b/src/settings.py
index d76295c..1d404c4 100644
--- a/src/settings.py
+++ b/src/settings.py
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-from src.parsers import parse_optional_int
+from src.parsers import parse_optional_int, parse_int, parse_stripped_str, parse_bool
 
 DEFAULTS = {"debug": False, "port": 8000, "timeout": 30}
 
@@ -6,11 +6,24 @@ DEFAULTS = {"debug": False, "port": 8000, "timeout": 30}
 def load_settings(env: dict[str, str]) -> dict[str, object]:
     settings = DEFAULTS.copy()
     if "APP_PORT" in env:
-        parsed_port = parse_optional_int(env["APP_PORT"])
-        if parsed_port is not None:
-            settings["port"] = parsed_port
+        port_str = parse_stripped_str(env["APP_PORT"])
+        if port_str != "":
+            try:
+                settings["port"] = parse_int(port_str)
+            except ValueError:
+                pass
     if "APP_TIMEOUT" in env:
-        settings["timeout"] = env["APP_TIMEOUT"]
+        timeout_str = parse_stripped_str(env["APP_TIMEOUT"])
+        if timeout_str != "":
+            try:
+                settings["timeout"] = parse_int(timeout_str)
+            except ValueError:
+                pass
     if "APP_DEBUG" in env:
-        settings["debug"] = env["APP_DEBUG"] == "true"
+        debug_str = parse_stripped_str(env["APP_DEBUG"]).lower()
+        if debug_str != "":
+            try:
+                settings["debug"] = parse_bool(debug_str)
+            except ValueError:
+                pass
     return settings
